steps.title: Close the interrupting phrase
steps.content: The comma after that opens an interrupting phrase: through community involvement and scientific study. The blank appears at the end of that phrase, so a matching comma is needed before the main verb aim.

steps.title: Reject mismatched punctuation
steps.content: Choice A leaves the interrupting phrase unclosed. Choice C uses a colon before a verb phrase, which is not the needed boundary. Choice D switches to a dash even though the interruption was opened with a comma. A comma after study correctly closes the phrase. The answer is B.
